mission.title: argo-events: The `JoinChannel` api call is fully deprecated for new Slack applications
mission.description: The `JoinChannel` api call is fully deprecated for new Slack applications. Requested by 8+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo-events deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo-events version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events
helm list -n argo-events 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-events installation.

steps.title: Review argo-events configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events
kubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events
```
Slack has deprecated the channels.join api call and suggests to use conversations.join instead. API calls now return with `method_deprecated` for `JoinChannel` when you are using a Slack app created after June 10th (or so).

steps.title: Apply the fix for The `JoinChannel` api call is fully deprecated for new…
steps.description:
- Resolves #308 
- Adds signature verification if Signing Secret is provided as a Kubernetes secret reference in the Gateway configmap.

Adds support for Slack Interactions - action events generated when a user interacts with a [block elements and interactive
```yaml
sensors/triggers/slack/slack.go
114:	_, _, _, err = api.JoinConversation(channel)
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events
kubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "The `JoinChannel` api call is fully deprecated for new…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
- Resolves #308 
- Adds signature verification if Signing Secret is provided as a Kubernetes secret reference in the Gateway configmap.

Adds support for Slack Interactions - action events generated when a user interacts with a [block elements and interactive components](https://api.slack.com/messaging/interactivity#components).

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-events installed or the issue environment reproducible.
